property.name: yarn.resourcemanager.address
property.description: The address of the applications manager interface in the ResourceManager.

property.name: yarn.resourcemanager.scheduler.address
property.description: The address of the scheduler interface.

property.name: yarn.resourcemanager.webapp.address
property.description: The http address of the ResourceManager web application.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.aux-services
property.description: shuffle service that needs to be set for Map Reduce to run.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.memory-mb
property.description: Amount of physical memory, in MB, that can be allocated for containers.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.cpu-vcores
property.description: Number of CPU cores that can be allocated for containers.

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.webapp.address
property.description: The http address of the NodeManager web application.

property.name: yarn.resourcemanager.scheduler.class
property.description: The class to use as the resource scheduler.

property.name: yarn.app.mapreduce.am.resource.mb
property.description: The amount of memory the MR AppMaster needs.

property.name: yarn.scheduler.minimum-allocation-mb
property.description: Minimum limit of memory to allocate to each container request at the ResourceManager.

property.name: yarn.scheduler.maximum-allocation-mb
property.description: Maximum limit of memory to allocate to each container request at the ResourceManager.
